user.title: Lynk & Co Login
user.description: Click Next to generate the login URL.

auth_url.title: Open Login URL
auth_url.description:
1. Open your browser DevTools (F12) > Network tab > enable Persist Logs
2. Open this URL in your browser:

{auth_url}

3. Log in with your Lynk & Co email, password, and SMS MFA code
4. After MFA, the browser will fail on msauth://
5. In DevTools Network tab, find the 302 request > Response Headers > Location
6. Copy the full msauth://... URL

Click Next when ready to paste the URL.

paste_redirect.title: Paste Redirect URL
paste_redirect.description: Paste the full msauth://... URL from the browser DevTools Location header.

error.no_code: No authorization code found in the URL
error.exchange_failed: Failed to exchange code for tokens. Code may have expired — try again.
error.no_vehicles: No vehicles found on this account
